title: Elemental Blades
description: Elemental Blades adds seven new swords into Minecraft intended to add some content choices to the late game.
body:
Elemental Blades is an attempt to bring some new life to the swords inside of Minecraft, with seven swords, each one based around a different element, and each one with unique bonuses and buffs that it adds to make it different from the other swords, all of the swords are intended for late gaming, requiring a core of a Netherite sword, and then being surrounded by materials inside of a crafting table, each sword grants the user two potion effects when in the main hand, and has one unique ability.

Lava Sword: The Lava Sword is created by surrounding a Netherite sword with blaze powder in a crafting table, the special ability of the Lava Sword is when right clicked it will replace the block it is being looked at with lave, as well as the one beneath it, the Lava Sword is the exception, and only has one potion effect, and that is Fire Resistance 5, protecting you from any fire or lava damage.

Lightning Sword: The Lightning Sword is created by surrounding a Netherite Sword with copper ingots in a crafting table, the special ability is when you right click with the Lightning Sword, lightning will strike the block or entity you were looking at, and it's bonus effects are Fire Resistance 1 and Speed 1.

Ice Sword: The Ice Sword is created by surrounding a Netherite Sword with ice in a crafting table, the special ability is when you right click with the Ice Sword, a two block high pillar of ice will appear acting as a temporary shield, and it's bonus effects are Water Breathing 1 and Slow Falling1.

Sand Sword: The Sand Sword is created by surrounding a Netherite Sword with sandstone in a crafting table, the special ability is when you strike an enemy with the Sand Stone they will get the wither, slowness, and weakness effects making them an easier target, and it's bonus effects are Luck 1 and Regeneration 1.

Earth Sword: The Earth Sword is created by surrounding a Netherite Sword with obsidian in a crafting table, the special ability is when you strike and enemy they will get dragged beneath the ground and have a chance of getting back out, also the Earth Sword has a much higher number of uses than the other swords and it's bonus effects are Resistance and Strength 1.

Wind Sword: The Wind Sword is created by surrounding a Netherite Sword with feathers in a crafting table, the special ability is when you hit an NPC they get launched into the sky and most likely will not survive the fall, and it's bonus effects are Speed 1 and Jump Boost 1.

Water Sword: The Water Sword is created by surrounding a Netherite Sword with water buckets in a crafting table, the special ability is when you right click with the Water Sword, water will be place beneath you, and it's bonus effects are Water Breathing 1 and Dolphins Grace 1.
